title: Peaceful Harvest and Blue Moons
description: Makes the Harvest and Blue Moons from Enhanced Celestials less dangerous.
body:
![Peaceful Harvest Moon header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ab048d3a1234b93a52267cd8f11ddfd0cc171dc.png)
Have you ever gotten a Super Harvest Moon and gone out to harvest your crops and bam! swarmed by zombies, or worse creepers? Have you gotten a Super Blue Moon, but your fishing keeps getting interrupted by drowned? Do you wish that beneficial moons were also peaceful?

Now they can be!


Choose one of two files:

- Replace the default moons with peaceful versions
- or Add new peaceful versions in addition to the defaults

All credit for [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) goes to Corgi Taco

Join [my Discord](https://discord.gg/kpN4eRbVsS)!
